title: Runtime config scratch evidence workflow cross-link
problem: Ticket-081 adds a build loop doc pointer to the runbook scratch evidence checklist, but docs/agents/12_RUNTIME_CONFIG.md documents scratch DB paths without linking operators to the numbered workflow checklist.
acceptance_criteria: 12_RUNTIME_CONFIG.md links to runbook Scratch evidence workflow checklist near scratch DB documentation.
non_goals: No build loop or runbook body rewrites.
